quotes.text: If your code needs comments to be understood, rewrite the code. If your code needs comments to be maintained, document the architecture.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The only valid measurement of code quality is how many times you have to read it to understand it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best engineers leave code better than they found it. The worst leave it worse than they found it. Most leave it the same.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best engineers are the ones who make other engineers better. Write code that teaches.
quotes.author: based
